examples: We cannot stand the stuffiness of the room.
Decongestants help ease stuffiness. They shrink swollen tissue inside the noses.
The father of a baby, who was bothered by the stuffiness, tried to smash Windows to get air into the carriages.
The group's colonial-style uniforms have been replaced with new, trendier ones from Ally Capellino, a fashion designer, and much of the old imperial stuffiness is gone.
But they are not very good at treating stuffiness.
